title: Sync. workflow across skopeo, buildah, and podman
body:
Besides adding ***BIG FAT WARNING*** this commit updates the
containers-repo. logic to only (and properly) handle the `stable` image
(both version and `latest` tags).  This change was already discussed at
length with @TomSweeneyRedHat 

See also: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3249

comments.body:
LGTM
but one of the tests is failing, I restarted the flake.

Saving the planet by force merging.
